task_completion.description: Navigate to the edit page for the default checkout flow.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the Drupal admin interface for editing a checkout flow, specifically the 'Default' checkout flow settings page.

task_completion.description: Rename the checkout flow to 'Express Checkout'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Name' input field on the checkout flow edit page is filled with the text 'Express Checkout'.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Coupon redemption' pane within the 'Order information' step.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the checkout panes configuration table, the 'Coupon redemption' row is positioned under the 'Order information' region, or its region dropdown is set to 'Order information'.

task_completion.description: Enable the 'Order summary' pane within the 'Review' step.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the checkout panes configuration table, the 'Order summary' row is positioned under the 'Review' region, or its region dropdown is set to 'Review'.
The 'Completion message' text area contains exactly: 'Thank you for shopping at Urban Electronics! Your order has been placed successfully.'

task_completion.description: Save the updated checkout flow configuration.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success message is displayed on the screen indicating that the checkout flow (e.g., 'The checkout flow Express Checkout has been updated.') has been successfully saved.

integrity.description: The agent used the Drupal web GUI to make changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent clicking through the Drupal admin web interface in a browser, rather than using terminal commands like 'drush' to modify configuration.

integrity.description: The agent did not directly edit the configuration YAML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is not seen opening 'commerce_checkout.commerce_checkout_flow.default.yml' in a text editor (like nano or vim) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Urban Electronics application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar and page content correspond to the live Drupal site, not a locally created mock HTML page or text document.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected checkout flow name is 'Express Checkout'. The 'Coupon redemption' pane must be placed in the 'Order information' step (system name: order_information). The 'Order summary' pane must be placed in the 'Review' step (system name: review). The completion message must exactly match: 'Thank you for shopping at Urban Electronics! Your order has been placed successfully.'
